_comment: Opportunity: Vein Essence Pool. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 10000 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Core Formation), perception (Nascent Soul (to perceive the pool)), and luck (modifier 1.0). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Vein Essence Pool
description: A pool of condensed spirit-vein essence, naturally forming at vein cores. Exists because: spirit veins condense essence over millennia.
why_untaken: Vein cores are guarded by vein-guardian beasts.
natural_next_event: Pool overflows; essence disperses; beasts converge.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
